ul.li: Convention: Network Byte Order (Big Endian) for the sequence.

text.tspan: // Index 0 is always the start of OUI
// Index 0 is always the start of OUI

ol.li: Little-endian CPUs place the lowest memory address (ptr[0]) into the Least Significant Byte (LSB) of the register.
Numeric comparison (valA > valB) now incorrectly treats the OUI (the start) as the least significant portion.
